assessment.title: AI App Engineer Capability Assessment
assessment.title_zh: AI 应用开发工程师能力测评
assessment.description: Evaluate your engineering capabilities across 6 key areas
assessment.description_zh: 评估你在 6 个关键领域的工程能力

questions.question: How do you manage configuration (API keys, database URLs) in a Python application?
questions.question_zh: 你如何在 Python 应用中管理配置（API 密钥、数据库 URL）？

options.text: Hardcode in source code
options.text_zh: 硬编码在源码中

options.text: Use a config.py file with constants
options.text_zh: 使用 config.py 文件存放常量

options.text: Read from .env file with os.getenv
options.text_zh: 从 .env 文件读取，使用 os.getenv

options.text: Use pydantic-settings with .env and validation
options.text_zh: 使用 pydantic-settings，配合 .env 和验证

questions.question: How do you ensure function parameters and return values are correctly typed?
questions.question_zh: 你如何确保函数参数和返回值的类型正确？

options.text: I don't check types, Python is dynamic
options.text_zh: 不检查类型，Python 是动态语言

options.text: Add type hints for documentation purposes
options.text_zh: 添加类型注解用于文档说明

options.text: Use type hints and run mypy for static checking
options.text_zh: 使用类型注解并运行 mypy 进行静态检查

options.text: Use type hints, mypy, Pydantic models, and runtime validation where needed
options.text_zh: 使用类型注解、mypy、Pydantic 模型，并在必要时进行运行时验证

questions.question: How do you handle errors in a Python backend service?
questions.question_zh: 你如何在 Python 后端服务中处理错误？

options.text: Wrap everything in bare except: pass
options.text_zh: 用 bare except: pass 包裹所有代码

options.text: Catch specific exceptions and log them
options.text_zh: 捕获特定异常并记录日志

options.text: Define custom exception hierarchy, catch and log with context
options.text_zh: 定义自定义异常层级，捕获并记录带上下文的日志

options.text: Custom exceptions with error codes, structured logging, and global exception handler
options.text_zh: 自定义异常带错误码、结构化日志，以及全局异常处理器

questions.question: How do you design API endpoints for a resource (e.g., users, tasks)?
questions.question_zh: 你如何为资源（如用户、任务）设计 API 端点？

options.text: Use GET for everything, pass action as query param
options.text_zh: 所有操作都用 GET，用 query 参数区分动作

options.text: Use appropriate HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
options.text_zh: 使用合适的 HTTP 方法（GET、POST、PUT、DELETE）

options.text: RESTful design with proper status codes and resource naming
options.text_zh: RESTful 设计，使用正确的状态码和资源命名

options.text: RESTful with versioning, pagination, filtering, and OpenAPI docs
options.text_zh: RESTful 设计，包含版本控制、分页、过滤和 OpenAPI 文档

questions.question: How do you validate incoming request data in a FastAPI application?
questions.question_zh: 你如何在 FastAPI 应用中验证传入的请求数据？

options.text: Manually check each field in the endpoint function
options.text_zh: 在端点函数中手动检查每个字段

options.text: Use request.json() and basic if/else validation
options.text_zh: 使用 request.json() 和基本的 if/else 验证

options.text: Use Pydantic BaseModel for request body validation
options.text_zh: 使用 Pydantic BaseModel 验证请求体

options.text: Pydantic models with Field validators, custom types, and response models
options.text_zh: Pydantic 模型配合 Field 验证器、自定义类型和响应模型

questions.question: How do you share database connections or services across endpoints?
questions.question_zh: 你如何在多个端点之间共享数据库连接或服务？

options.text: Create a global database connection at module level
options.text_zh: 在模块级别创建全局数据库连接

options.text: Create a new connection in each endpoint function
options.text_zh: 在每个端点函数中创建新连接

options.text: Use a factory function to create connections
options.text_zh: 使用工厂函数创建连接

options.text: Use FastAPI Depends with yield for lifecycle-managed dependencies
options.text_zh: 使用 FastAPI 的 Depends + yield 管理依赖生命周期

questions.question: How do you make an API call to an LLM service (e.g., OpenAI)?
questions.question_zh: 你如何调用 LLM 服务（如 OpenAI）的 API？

options.text: Use urllib with manual URL construction
options.text_zh: 使用 urllib 手动构建 URL

options.text: Use requests.post with hardcoded headers
options.text_zh: 使用 requests.post 和硬编码的 headers

options.text: Use requests with proper auth headers, JSON body, and response parsing
options.text_zh: 使用 requests 配合正确的认证头、JSON 请求体和响应解析

options.text: Use official SDK (openai/anthropic) with environment-based config and error handling
options.text_zh: 使用官方 SDK（openai/anthropic），基于环境变量配置并处理错误

questions.question: An LLM API call fails intermittently due to network issues. How do you handle it?
questions.question_zh: LLM API 调用因网络问题间歇性失败，你如何处理？

options.text: Let the application crash and restart manually
options.text_zh: 让应用崩溃，手动重启

options.text: Wrap in try/except and show error to user
options.text_zh: 用 try/except 包裹并向用户显示错误

options.text: Add basic retry with fixed delay (e.g., sleep 3 seconds)
options.text_zh: 添加基本重试，使用固定延迟（如 sleep 3 秒）

options.text: Exponential backoff with jitter, timeout control, and max retry limit
options.text_zh: 指数退避加抖动、超时控制和最大重试次数限制

questions.question: Users complain that LLM responses take too long to appear. What do you implement?
questions.question_zh: 用户抱怨 LLM 响应出现得太慢，你会实现什么？

options.text: Tell users to wait, the model is just slow
options.text_zh: 告诉用户等待，模型就是慢

options.text: Show a loading spinner until the full response arrives
options.text_zh: 在完整响应到达前显示加载动画

options.text: Implement streaming to show tokens as they arrive
options.text_zh: 实现流式响应，在 token 到达时立即显示

options.text: Streaming with SSE, chunked transfer, and graceful fallback for non-streaming clients
options.text_zh: SSE 流式响应、分块传输，以及对非流式客户端的优雅降级

questions.question: How do you split a long document into chunks for a RAG system?
questions.question_zh: 你如何为 RAG 系统将长文档分割成块？

options.text: Split by fixed character count, no overlap
options.text_zh: 按固定字符数分割，无重叠

options.text: Split by paragraphs or sentences
options.text_zh: 按段落或句子分割

options.text: Split by size with overlap to preserve context
options.text_zh: 按大小分割并设置重叠以保留上下文

options.text: Semantic chunking with overlap, metadata tracking, and recursive splitting for nested structures
options.text_zh: 语义分块加重叠、元数据追踪，以及对嵌套结构的递归分割

questions.question: How do you convert text chunks into vectors for similarity search?
questions.question_zh: 你如何将文本块转换为向量用于相似度搜索？

options.text: I don't know what embeddings are
options.text_zh: 不知道什么是嵌入向量

options.text: Use a pre-trained embedding model via API
options.text_zh: 通过 API 使用预训练的嵌入模型

options.text: Use embedding API and store vectors in a list or numpy array
options.text_zh: 使用嵌入 API 并将向量存储在列表或 numpy 数组中

options.text: Use embedding API with a vector database (FAISS/Pinecone), batch processing, and caching
options.text_zh: 使用嵌入 API 配合向量数据库（FAISS/Pinecone）、批处理和缓存

questions.question: After embedding your documents, how do you find the most relevant chunks for a query?
questions.question_zh: 嵌入文档后，你如何为查询找到最相关的文本块？

options.text: Return the first N chunks from the document
options.text_zh: 返回文档的前 N 个块

options.text: Use keyword matching (e.g., TF-IDF)
options.text_zh: 使用关键词匹配（如 TF-IDF）

options.text: Compute cosine similarity between query and chunk embeddings, return top-k
options.text_zh: 计算查询和块嵌入之间的余弦相似度，返回 top-k

options.text: Cosine similarity top-k with metadata filtering, score threshold, and hybrid search (vector + keyword)
options.text_zh: 余弦相似度 top-k 加元数据过滤、分数阈值和混合搜索（向量 + 关键词）

questions.question: How do you let an AI agent use external tools (e.g., search, calculator)?
questions.question_zh: 你如何让 AI Agent 使用外部工具（如搜索、计算器）？

options.text: Hardcode tool logic directly in the prompt
options.text_zh: 将工具逻辑直接硬编码在 prompt 中

options.text: Use if/else to match user intent to function calls
options.text_zh: 使用 if/else 匹配用户意图到函数调用

options.text: Define a tool registry with name, description, and callable
options.text_zh: 定义工具注册表，包含名称、描述和可调用函数

options.text: Tool registry with JSON schema, LLM-based tool selection, and structured output parsing
options.text_zh: 工具注册表配合 JSON Schema、基于 LLM 的工具选择和结构化输出解析

questions.question: How do you prevent an AI agent from executing dangerous operations?
questions.question_zh: 你如何防止 AI Agent 执行危险操作？

options.text: Trust the LLM to not do anything harmful
options.text_zh: 相信 LLM 不会做有害的事

options.text: Add basic string matching to block known bad commands
options.text_zh: 添加基本的字符串匹配来阻止已知的危险命令

options.text: Implement allowlist of permitted tools and parameter validation
options.text_zh: 实现允许的工具白名单和参数验证

options.text: Allowlist + rate limiting + confirmation for destructive actions + audit logging
options.text_zh: 白名单 + 频率限制 + 破坏性操作确认 + 审计日志

questions.question: How do you maintain conversation context across multiple agent interactions?
questions.question_zh: 你如何在多次 Agent 交互中维持对话上下文？

options.text: Send the entire conversation history every time
options.text_zh: 每次都发送完整的对话历史

options.text: Keep a list of recent messages in memory
options.text_zh: 在内存中保存最近的消息列表

options.text: Sliding window of recent turns with system prompt
options.text_zh: 使用滑动窗口保存最近的对话轮次加上系统 prompt

options.text: Sliding window + summarization of old turns + persistent storage
options.text_zh: 滑动窗口 + 旧对话摘要 + 持久化存储

questions.question: How do you deploy a Python web application?
questions.question_zh: 你如何部署 Python Web 应用？

options.text: Run python main.py directly on the server
options.text_zh: 直接在服务器上运行 python main.py

options.text: Use a basic Dockerfile with pip install
options.text_zh: 使用基本的 Dockerfile 加 pip install

options.text: Multi-stage Dockerfile with slim base and requirements.txt
options.text_zh: 多阶段 Dockerfile，使用 slim 基础镜像和 requirements.txt

options.text: Multi-stage build + docker-compose + health checks + non-root user
options.text_zh: 多阶段构建 + docker-compose + 健康检查 + 非 root 用户

questions.question: How do you ensure code quality before deploying to production?
questions.question_zh: 你如何确保部署到生产环境前代码质量？

options.text: Test manually on my laptop before pushing
options.text_zh: 在笔记本上手动测试后再推送

options.text: Run tests locally before pushing to main
options.text_zh: 推送到 main 分支前在本地运行测试

options.text: Set up GitHub Actions to run tests on every push
options.text_zh: 设置 GitHub Actions 在每次推送时运行测试

options.text: CI with lint + test + type check + security scan, and CD with staging environment
options.text_zh: CI 包含 lint + 测试 + 类型检查 + 安全扫描，CD 包含预发布环境

questions.question: How do you debug issues in a production Python application?
questions.question_zh: 你如何调试生产环境中的 Python 应用问题？

options.text: Add print() statements and redeploy
options.text_zh: 添加 print() 语句并重新部署

options.text: Use Python's logging module with file output
options.text_zh: 使用 Python 的 logging 模块输出到文件

options.text: Structured logging with levels and correlation IDs
options.text_zh: 结构化日志，包含日志级别和关联 ID

options.text: Structured JSON logs + centralized log aggregation + alerting + distributed tracing
options.text_zh: 结构化 JSON 日志 + 集中式日志聚合 + 告警 + 分布式追踪
